entities.label: Whiskers
dialog: Mrrow.
The cat stares through you, unimpressed.
It purrs. You feel slightly braver.

entities.label: Town Crier
dialog: Hear ye! The council convenes at dusk!
Strange lights over the old ruins, they say...
Guards are recruiting. Merchants are hiring. Choose wisely!

entities.label: Mara the Baker
dialog: Fresh loaves! Still warm!
The syndicate's been leaning on honest folk again.
You look like someone standing at a crossroads, dear.

entities.label: Pip
dialog: Psst. The alley folk pay coin for quiet feet.
I seen the Magpie once! Honest!

entities.label: Guildmistress Sela
dialog: The Guild rewards sharp minds and sharper ledgers.
Reputation is currency here. Spend it wisely.
The syndicate undercuts us with smuggled goods. It must stop.

entities.label: Tobin the Hawker
dialog: Trinkets! Charms! Slightly cursed amulets, half price!
A merchant's seal opens doors, friend. Earn one.

entities.label: Clerk Ottway
dialog: Petitions in triplicate, please.
The council debates the ruins expedition again.
Between us: the treasury is thinner than it looks.

entities.label: Chamber Guard
dialog: No weapons past the columns.
The captain speaks well of new recruits.

entities.label: Captain Bren
dialog: Stand straight. The town watches its watchmen.
Discipline first. Glory is a rumor.
Prove yourself and the guard will open its ranks.

entities.label: Recruit Anya
dialog: My arms ache from drills...
They say the captain never sleeps.

entities.label: Weasel
dialog: Buying? Selling? Forgetting you saw me?
The hideout's below. Knock twice, then don't knock.
The Magpie collects favors like coins.

entities.label: Old Marn
dialog: Spare a coin for a seer past her prime?
I see two doors in your fate, child. Gold... and shadow.

entities.label: The Magpie
dialog: Everything shiny finds its way to me eventually.
Rules? One: don't get caught. Two: see rule one.
Do a job for me and the underworld remembers.

entities.label: Lookout Vex
dialog: Eyes up. Guards sniffed around the alley twice today.
The tunnel to the market? Merchants pretend it isn't there.

entities.label: Ranger Iole
dialog: The trail forks many ways. All of them are watching you.
Cottage west, ruins east, temple and retreat to the south.
Take water. The wilds don't forgive the unprepared.

entities.label: Wandering Scholar
dialog: I'm cataloguing everything! Ferns! Rocks! Existential dread!
The old archive lies somewhere past the ruins...

entities.label: Master Aldous
dialog: Ah, my favorite student. Don't tell the others.
Fate is a crossroads, not a cage. You choose the road.
Wisdom weighs less than a sword and cuts deeper.

entities.label: Aldous's Raven
dialog: Krah! Doom! ...or breakfast. Hard to say.
Krah!

entities.label: Field Scholar Nym
dialog: These carvings predate the town by a thousand years.
Whatever toppled this hall left claw marks. Big ones.
The cursed approach is east. I don't go east.

entities.label: Faded Echo
dialog: ...turn back...
...the door remembers...
...we stayed too long...

entities.label: Archivist Prynn
dialog: Shhh. The pool is listening.
Knowledge kept is a candle. Knowledge shared is a dawn.
The wilderness archive? Lost. Mostly. Probably.

entities.label: Novice Callo
dialog: I've read the same sentence nine times...
Do you think the masters would notice if I napped?

entities.label: Priestess Sera
dialog: The temple opens to the worthy, not the hurried.
Beyond the shining door waits what you have earned.
Even the cursed may kneel here. Few do.

entities.label: Weary Pilgrim
dialog: Forty days I walked to see the door...
They say it only opens at the story's end.

entities.label: Hollow Acolyte
dialog: We opened the portal. We were so clever.
The fire below sings at night. Don't listen.
Leave. Or stay. It ends the same.

entities.label: Watcher in the Dust
dialog: I count the stones. The stones count you.
The spire fell in a single night.

entities.label: Sniggering Imp
dialog: Hee hee! Fresh soles on the hot floor!
The boss doesn't like visitors. The boss LOVES visitors.
Exit's behind you. It's always behind you.

entities.label: Chained Shade
dialog: I bargained once. Read the fine print.
The throne remembers every knee that bent.

entities.label: Celestial Herald
dialog: Every road you walked echoes here.
The court weighs deeds, not intentions.
Beyond the threshold, your future takes its final shape.

entities.label: Weaver of Threads
dialog: I wove your thread the day you woke.
Gold, steel, shadow, or wisdom — all threads shine at this height.
